---
title: "Handcrafted Wooden Gifts and Furniture"
---

## Welcome to Murray Woodworks!

![](images/banner.png){width='100%'}

Welcome! At Murray Woodworks, we specialize in creating beautiful, handcrafted wooden gifts and furniture that are perfect for any occasion. Whether you're looking for a unique gift for a loved one or a custom piece to enhance your home, we've got you covered.Take a look around our website to explore our [Gallery](gallery.qmd) of past projects, check out our [Shop](shop.qmd) for available items, and learn more [About](about.qmd) our craftsmanship. If you have any questions or would like to discuss a custom order, please feel free to [Contact](contact.qmd) us. We're excited to help you find the perfect wooden piece!


<!-- 1. FULL WIDTH CAROUSEL NAVIGATION -->

<div id="heroCarousel" class="carousel slide mb-5 shadow-lg" data-bs-ride="carousel">
<!-- Indicators/Dots -->
<div class="carousel-indicators">
<button type="button" data-bs-target="#heroCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active" aria-current="true" aria-label="Slide 1"></button>
<button type="button" data-bs-target="#heroCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="1" aria-label="Slide 2"></button>
<button type="button" data-bs-target="#heroCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="2" aria-label="Slide 3"></button>
</div>

<!-- The Slideshow Items -->

<div class="carousel-inner rounded-3">

<!-- Slide 1: Shop -->
<div class="carousel-item active" data-bs-interval="5000">
  <a href="shop.qmd">
    <img src="images/banner_shop.png" class="d-block w-100 object-fit-cover" style="height: 450px;" alt="Shop Our Inventory">
    <div class="carousel-caption d-none d-md-block bg-dark bg-opacity-50 rounded-3 p-4">
      <h2 class="display-5 fw-bold text-white">Live Inventory Shop</h2>
      <p class="lead">Browse our serialized components and add to your cart in real-time.</p>
      <span class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Start Shopping</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- Slide 2: Gallery -->
<div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="5000">
  <a href="gallery.qmd">
    <img src="images/banner_gallery.jpg" class="d-block w-100 object-fit-cover" style="height: 450px;" alt="Product Gallery">
    <div class="carousel-caption d-none d-md-block bg-dark bg-opacity-50 rounded-3 p-4">
      <h2 class="display-5 fw-bold text-white">Materials Gallery</h2>
      <p class="lead">View high-resolution photography and technical specs of our products.</p>
      <span class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">View Gallery</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- Slide 3: About -->
<div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="5000">
  <a href="about.qmd">
    <img src="images/banner_about.jpg" class="d-block w-100 object-fit-cover" style="height: 450px;" alt="About Us">
    <div class="carousel-caption d-none d-md-block bg-dark bg-opacity-50 rounded-3 p-4">
      <h2 class="display-5 fw-bold text-white">Our Mission</h2>
      <p class="lead">Learn about our commitment to serialized tracking and quality supply chains.</p>
      <span class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Learn More</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>


</div>

<!-- Left and right controls/icons -->

<button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#heroCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
<span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
</button>
<button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#heroCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
<span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
</button>
</div>

<!-- 2. POPUP MENU TABLE -->

<div class="container-fluid">
<h2 class="text-center mb-4">Today's Quick-Pay Menu</h2>

:::{.alert .alert-info .text-center .shadow-sm}
**How to Pay:** Click "Pay Now," enter the exact price listed below, and complete your secure Stripe payment.
:::

<div class="table-responsive shadow-xl rounded-xl">
<table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0 bg-white border">
<thead class="bg-primary text-white">
<tr class="text-uppercase text-xs letter-spacing-1">
<th scope="col" class="py-3 px-4">Photo</th>
<th scope="col" class="py-3">Item & Description</th>
<th scope="col" class="py-3">Price</th>
<th scope="col" class="py-3 text-center">Action</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<!-- ROW 1 -->
<tr>
<td style="width: 15%;" class="px-4">
<img src="https://placehold.co/120x120/1e40af/ffffff?text=CANDLE" class="rounded-lg shadow-sm border" alt="Product 1">
</td>
<td>
<h6 class="fw-bold mb-1">Signature Zen Candle</h6>
<p class="text-muted mb-0 small">Large soy candle. Sandalwood & Vanilla. 50hr burn.</p>
</td>
<td class="fw-bold text-lg text-success">$15.00</td>
<td class="text-center">
<a href="YOUR_STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success shadow-sm px-4">Pay Now</a>
</td>
</tr>
<!-- Add more rows here as needed following the pattern above -->
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
